title: Contribute to planning and implementing business improvement in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Contribute to planning and implementing business improvement in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Review business plan and business performance

pcs.text: Goals and key performance indicators (KPIs) specified in workplace business plan are analysed and relevance to operational area is assessed1.2 Gaps and risks to achieving business goals and KPIs are identified1.3 Risk management strategies to meet business goals and KPIs are identified and developed1.4 Contingency plan to address possible areas of non-conformance with the plan is developed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Goals and key performance indicators (KPIs) specified in workplace business plan are analysed and relevance to operational area is assessed1.2 Gaps and risks to achieving business goals and KPIs are identified1.3 Risk management strategies to meet business goals and KPIs are identified and developed1.4 Contingency plan to address possible areas of non-conformance with the plan is developed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Goals and key performance indicators (KPIs) specified in workplace business plan are analysed and relevance to operational area is assessed1.2 Gaps and risks to achieving business goals and KPIs are identified1.3 Risk management strategies to meet business goals and KPIs are identified and developed1.4 Contingency plan to address possible areas of non-conformance with the plan is developed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Review business plan and business performance

elements.title: Assist in developing, implementing and monitoring marketing and promotional strategies

pcs.text: Key business products or services are analysed to determine a suitable focus for marketing and promotional activities, according to the objectives of the business plan2.2 Costs and benefits of using different distribution channels and providing different levels of customer service are analysed to determine the appropriate marketing mix2.3 Agreed marketing and promotional strategies are agreed and implemented2.4 Marketing activities are monitored and business performance is evaluated according to the objectives and targets of the business plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Key business products or services are analysed to determine a suitable focus for marketing and promotional activities, according to the objectives of the business plan2.2 Costs and benefits of using different distribution channels and providing different levels of customer service are analysed to determine the appropriate marketing mix2.3 Agreed marketing and promotional strategies are agreed and implemented2.4 Marketing activities are monitored and business performance is evaluated according to the objectives and targets of the business plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Key business products or services are analysed to determine a suitable focus for marketing and promotional activities, according to the objectives of the business plan2.2 Costs and benefits of using different distribution channels and providing different levels of customer service are analysed to determine the appropriate marketing mix2.3 Agreed marketing and promotional strategies are agreed and implemented2.4 Marketing activities are monitored and business performance is evaluated according to the objectives and targets of the business plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assist in developing, implementing and monitoring marketing and promotional strategies

elements.title: Seek continuous improvement opportunities

pcs.text: Business development strategies are regularly reviewed with supervisor 3.2 Operational plans are reviewed to determine possible improvements to business3.3 New ideas or activities are presented as a business case and discussed with line manager3.4 Approval is sought from line manager before implementing new ideas and activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Business development strategies are regularly reviewed with supervisor 3.2 Operational plans are reviewed to determine possible improvements to business3.3 New ideas or activities are presented as a business case and discussed with line manager3.4 Approval is sought from line manager before implementing new ideas and activities?

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
